verses.commentary: Gather around. Deathbed scene. All twelve summoned. Prophetic blessings.
Assemble and listen. Sons of Jacob. Call to attention. Both names used. Jacob and Israel.
My might. Reuben first. First son. Strength. Honor. Power.
Turbulent as waters. Defiled my couch. But. Unstable. Loses primacy. Sin with Bilhah (35:22) costs birthright.
Paired together. Violent men. Shechem massacre (chapter 34) remembered.
Not join assembly. Hamstrung oxen.
So fierce. Fury so cruel. Disperse in Israel. Anger cursed. Fierce and cruel. No tribal territory. Levi scattered as priests (but turned to blessing, Exodus 32:26-29).
Judah. Judah gets primacy. Praise (yehudah from yadah, praise). Brothers bow.
Return from prey. Like lion crouches. Like lioness. Who dares rouse? Royal imagery. Lion of Judah. Fierce and dominant. Messianic symbol.
Eternal kingship promised. David's line. Ruler's staff. Until Shiloh comes (or until tribute comes to him). Messianic prophecy. Jesus from Judah.
Abundance imagery. So much wine. Vines so strong.
Beauty described. Health and vitality.
Zebulun by seashore. Haven for ships. Border toward Sidon. Coastal tribe. Maritime trade. Northern boundary. Commercial blessing.
Strong donkey. Resting. Worker imagery. Agricultural tribe.
Pleasant land. Good land. Fertile territory.

Dan will provide justice for his people as one of the tribes of Israel. Dan will provide justice. For his people. Dan (דָּן) means judge. Will judge people. Tribal role. Justice ministry. Full tribe status.
Viper along path. Bites horse's heels. Rider tumbles. Dangerous. Cunning. Guerrilla warfare. Samson from Dan. Sneak attacks.
Waiting for God's deliverance (yeshuah, יְשׁוּעָה).
Gad (גָּד) means troop. Constant warfare. Military tribe. Fierce defenders.
Asher's food rich. Asher (אָשֵׁר) means happy/blessed. Fertile land. Rich food. Royal quality. Culinary blessing.
Naphtali (נַפְתָּלִי), my wrestling. Free and graceful. Beautiful offspring. Beautiful words (some translations). Freedom and beauty. Poetic blessing.
Near spring. Water source. Expansive blessing. Most favored son.
Shot with hostility. Brothers' attacks. Potiphar's wife. Prison. Hostility faced.
Bow remained steady. God sustained him. Mighty One. Shepherd. Rock. Titles for God.

Because of your father's God, who helps you, because of the Almighty, who blesses you with blessings of the skies above, blessings of the deep springs below, blessings of the breast and womb. Your father's God helps. Almighty blesses. Blessings of skies above. Deep springs below. Breast and womb. Comprehensive blessing. Heaven and earth. Rain and water. Total provision.

Your father's blessings are greater than the blessings of the ancient mountains, than the bounty of the age-old hills. Father's blessings greater than ancient mountains. Than age-old hills. Rest on Joseph. Surpassing blessings. Joseph exalted. Prince (nazir, נָזִיר, separated one).
Aggressive. Small but fierce.
All twelve tribes. Each appropriate blessing. Summary statement. Individual blessings. Each unique.
Bury with fathers. Death approaching. Gathered to people. Burial instructions. Family tomb.
Burial place. Specific location. Purchased land (chapter 23). Legal possession.
Family cemetery. Leah mentioned. Not Rachel (buried near Bethlehem, 35:19).
Abraham's transaction (chapter 23).
Breathed his last. Peaceful death. Final rest. Died in control. Gathered to people. Death as reunion.
